_comment: Collector Strategy — Ronin Monk Media LLC. Treat customers as collectors, not casual listeners.

collector_segments.name: Music Collectors
collector_segments.note: Bandcamp followers, vinyl mindset buyers, audiophiles

collector_segments.name: Book Collectors
collector_segments.note: Limited edition PDFs, numbered runs, signed digital editions

collector_segments.name: Art Collectors
collector_segments.note: Faction art prints, character illustrations, codex page art

collector_segments.name: Lore Collectors
collector_segments.note: Codex documents, canon transmissions, limited lore packs

collector_segments.name: Merch Collectors
collector_segments.note: Physical artifacts tied to lore — scrolls, patches, faction items

collector_segments.name: Future Game Players
collector_segments.note: 8-bit Sky Khan game; collector early-access tier

collector_segments.name: Future Members
collector_segments.note: Collector membership with exclusive drops and behind-the-scroll content

product_ideas.name: Digital Scroll Packs
product_ideas.description: Bundled lore documents formatted as in-universe scrolls — PDF art objects

product_ideas.name: Limited PDF Editions
product_ideas.description: Numbered, dated digital editions of existing titles. Scarcity creates collector value.

product_ideas.name: Lore Cards
product_ideas.description: Faction reference cards — character stats, faction abilities, era timelines. Digital first.

product_ideas.name: Music + Story Bundles
product_ideas.description: Album or track paired with the canonical novella or lore document it scores.

product_ideas.name: Behind-the-Scroll Commentary
product_ideas.description: Creator notes on lore decisions, worldbuilding process, faction design. Collector-only.

product_ideas.name: Collector Membership
product_ideas.description: Monthly or annual access tier with early drops, exclusive lore, and discount on new releases.

product_ideas.name: International Digital Box Set
product_ideas.description: All current Gumroad products bundled at a discount. Targets international collectors who want the full universe.

collector_philosophy: Ronin Monk Media customers are not casual consumers. They are initiates into the Sky Khan universe. Every product should feel like an artifact — discovered, not purchased.
